text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Mixed-type charts: when type='bar'/'line',
per-dataset .type overrides per row.
Reads ep-* tokens at runtime via
CssVarReader so dark-mode flips re-skin.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Default 8-color palette keyed off the
platform's brand tokens. paletteColor()
resolves at runtime from the host element's
getComputedStyle.

svg.text: DPH UI Kit — Chart Widget (Chart.js wrapper)
